name: Swiss Cheese Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the whole kernel corn well.
2. In a medium mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except the shredded Swiss cheese.
3. Mix the ingredients thoroughly.
4. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased baking pan with dimensions 12 x 7-1/2 x 1-1/2 inches.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 minutes.
6. Sprinkle the shredded Swiss cheese over the top of the cornbread.
7. Continue baking for an additional 10 to 15 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
